property.name: event_data
property.value: {"id":6,"name":"Trainer, Visual Editor, Terrain Tags","x":29,"y":1,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":118,"i":0,"p":["Start"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["Choose a topic."]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["About the trainer","Map connections","Terrain Tags","Cancel"],4]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"About the trainer"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["The $player global variable contains information "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["about the player, such as their trainer type, ID "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["number, name, party Pok\u00E9mon and money."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["This information is in class Player."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Map connections"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Map connections are how two maps are displayed "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["next to each other in the overworld, allowing you to "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["walk from one to the other."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["The connections are defined in the PBS file "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\u0022map_connections.txt\u0022. There is a Debug feature that "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["makes connecting maps easier."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["In the Debug menu, go to \u0022PBS File Editors...\u0022 \u003E "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\u0022Edit map_connections.txt\u0022. Instructions are available "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["within. You can move maps around with the mouse."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Terrain Tags"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Every tile in a tileset has a terrain tag, which is a "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["number. This number is used to give certain tiles "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["special effects."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["For example, ledge tiles have terrain tag 1, which "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["means the player jumps over them. Ledge tiles also "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["have a single passable direction (set separately)."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Grass tiles (in which you can have wild encounters) "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["have terrain tag 2. Water tiles have terrain tag 6 or 7."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Terrain tag 0 means the tile has no special effect. "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["See the wiki for more information and a complete list "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["of all terrain tags and their effects."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["You can only set terrain tags up to 7 via RPG Maker "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["XP\u0027s Database. Essentials has terrain tags with "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["higher numbers."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["To fully set a tileset\u0027s terrain tags, open the Debug "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["menu and go to \u0022Other Editors...\u0022 \u003E \u0022Edit Terrain "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Tags\u0022."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Cancel"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

property.name: event_data
property.value: {"id":12,"name":"Choices NPC","x":9,"y":7,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 08","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":6,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["The \u0022Show Choices\u0022 event command only allows you "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["to input up to 4 choices. If you want more, you can "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["have multiple \u0022Show Choices\u0022 in a row, and they will "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["be joined together and treated as one."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["You can have as many or as few choices in each "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["\u0022Show Choices\u0022 event command as you want. You "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["don\u0027t have to have the maximum 4 choices in one "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["before adding another one."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rI will offer you more than 4 choices at once. You "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["can put multiple \u0022Show Choices\u0022 commands in a row "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["to do this."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rPlease choose one."]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Choice 1","Choice 2","Choice 3","Choice 4"],0]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Choice 1"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 1 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Choice 2"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 2 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Choice 3"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 3 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Choice 4"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 4 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Choice 5","Choice 6"],0]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Choice 5"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 5 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Choice 6"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 6 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Choice 7"],5]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Choice 7"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 7 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":403,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["The choice was cancelled."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["================================"]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Each \u0022Show Choices\u0022 command has its own \u0022When "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["cancel\u0022 property. The last one that isn\u0027t \u0022Disallow\u0022 is "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["the one that will be used."]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["To forbid cancelling a choice, set all of the \u0022Show "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Choices\u0022 commands to \u0022Disallow\u0022."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rPlease choose one. This choice can\u0027t be cancelled."]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Choice 1","Choice 2","Choice 3","Choice 4"],0]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Choice 1"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 1 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Choice 2"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 2 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Choice 3"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 3 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Choice 4"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 4 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Choice 5","Choice 6","Choice 7"],0]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Choice 5"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 5 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Choice 6"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 6 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Choice 7"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 7 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["================================"]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["This is an example of setting the \u0022When cancel\u0022 "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["property in a \u0022Show Choices\u0022 command that isn\u0027t the "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["last one. The \u0022When cancel\u0022 properties in all later "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["\u0022Show Choices\u0022 commands should be set to "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["\u0022Disallow\u0022."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rPlease choose one. Cancelling will result in Choice "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["3."]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Choice 1","Choice 2","Choice 3","Choice 4"],3]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Choice 1"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 1 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Choice 2"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 2 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Choice 3"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 3 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Choice 4"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 4 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Choice 5","Choice 6","Choice 7"],0]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Choice 5"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 5 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Choice 6"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 6 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Choice 7"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Choice 7 was chosen."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["================================"]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["This is an example of renaming and hiding choices."]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["rename_choice and hide_choice apply to the next "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Show Choices command in the same event page, no "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["matter how much later it happens."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Renaming is useful if the name you want for a choice "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["is longer than RPG Maker XP allows, or if you want "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["that choice\u0027s name to vary, e.g. saying \u0022Potions: X\u0022 "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["where \u0022X\u0022 is how many Potions the player has."]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["if rand(2) == 0"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" rename_choice(1,"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["_I(\u0022This choice\u0027s name is too long!\u0022)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" )"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["else"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" qty = $bag.quantity(:POTION)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" rename_choice(1,"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" _I(\u0022Potions: {1}\u0022, qty)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":[" )"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["end"]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Hiding is useful for an NPC who unlocks choices "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["depending on certain conditions, e.g. the player "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["having particular Key Items. See the Route 8 harbor "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["map for an example of this."]},{"c":355,"i":0,"p":["hide_choice(2, !$player.male?)"]},{"c":655,"i":0,"p":["hide_choice(3, !$player.female?)"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rThis is an example of how to modify choices, using "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["the hide_choice and rename_choice scripts."]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["You won\u0027t see me!","The player is male","The player is female","Cancel"],4]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"You won\u0027t see me!"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["This choice was renamed by rename_choice."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"The player is male"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["This choice is hidden if the player is not male."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"The player is female"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["This choice is hidden if the player is not female."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Cancel"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

property.name: event_data
property.value: {"id":7,"name":"Debug, badges, screenshots","x":30,"y":1,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":2,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":118,"i":0,"p":["Start"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["Choose a topic."]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Debug mode","Give all badges","Taking screenshots","Cancel"],4]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Debug mode"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Debug mode is a special way of playing the game. It "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["unlocks various developer features to make it easier "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["to access all parts of the game and test things."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Playing in Debug mode allows you to access the "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Debug menu (press F9 or find it in the pause menu)."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["The party screen and Pok\u00E9mon storage have a "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["similar debug menu for modifying a Pok\u00E9mon\u0027s "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["properties, such as its level or species."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["You can use field moves at any time, and hold Ctrl to "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["skip any battles and decide the outcome of Trainer "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["battles. Hold Ctrl while moving to walk over anything."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["A full list of Debug mode features is available on the "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["wiki."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$DEBUG = true"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["The $DEBUG variable was set to true. This flag is set "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["automatically during playtesting within RMXP. This is "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["what causes the game to be in Debug mode."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Give all badges"]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["for i in 0...16"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":[" $player.badges[i] = true"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["end"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Obtained all Gym Badges for the first and second "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["regions."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["To add a Gym Badge, use $player.badges[X]=true "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["where X is a number from 0 through 7. Use"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["$player.badges[X] to see if you have a Badge."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Note that the first Gym Badge is number 0, the "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["second Badge is number 1, and so on."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["In Debug mode, you can set which Gym Badges you "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["have via the Debug menu."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Taking screenshots"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Press F8 to take a screenshot of the game."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["The screenshot will be put in the same folder as the "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["one containing the save file."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Cancel"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

property.name: event_data
property.value: {"id":13,"name":"Text formatting NPC","x":10,"y":7,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 07","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":4,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":118,"i":0,"p":["Start"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["Choose a text option."]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Text colours","Text formatting","Insert text/in-line graphics","Graphic and info windows"],0]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Text colours"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\bThis is the text of a male character."]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\\rThis is the text of a female character."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\pgThis text is the colour of the player\u0027s gender. "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\\pogThis text is the colour of the opposite gender to "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["the player."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\c[0]Default, \\c[1]blue, \\c[2]red, \\c[3]green, \\c[4]cyan, "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\\c[5]magenta, \\c[6]yellow, \\c[7]grey, \\c[8]white, "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\\c[9]purple, \\c[10]orange, \\c[11]dark, \\c[12]light."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Text formatting"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\u003Cb\u003EBold text,\u003C/b\u003E \u003Ci\u003Eitalic text,\u003C/i\u003E \u003Cu\u003Eunderlined "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["text,\u003C/u\u003E \u003Cs\u003Estrikethrough text,\u003C/s\u003E \u003Coutln\u003Eoutline "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["text,\u003C/outln\u003E \u003Coutln2\u003Ethicker outline text.\u003C/outln2\u003E"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\u003Cfn=Power Clear Bold\u003EPower Clear Bold text,\u003C/fn\u003E "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\u003Cfs=25\u003Esize 25 text,\u003C/fs\u003E \u003Cfs=40\u003Esize 40 text,\u003C/fs\u003E "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\u003Co=128\u003Ehalf-transparent text.\u003C/o\u003E"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["This is a line\\n break. Text is \\n\u003Cr\u003Eright-aligned until "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["next line\\n break. Text is \u003Cac\u003Ecentred\u003C/ac\u003E here. "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Text is \u003Car\u003Eright-aligned\u003C/ar\u003E here."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Insert text/in-line graphics"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\PN is the player\u0027s name, \\PM is the player\u0027s money, "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\\v[12] is the content of Game Variable 12."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["This is \u003Cicon=bagPocket3\u003E bagPocket3 from the "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["folder Graphics/Icons. Icons shown this "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["way are not padded."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Graphic and info windows"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\GThe money window is shown."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\CNThe coins window is shown."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\G\\CNThe money and coins windows are both "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["shown. The coins window must be shown second."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\f[introBoy]The introBoy picture from the "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["Graphics/Pictures folder is shown."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\ff[introBoy]The introBoy picture is shown again, but "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["cropped to the top-left 96x96 pixels of it."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["Message box appearance","Text speed and audio","Audio","Cancel"],4]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"Message box appearance"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\w[signskin]The windowskin has changed to "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\u0022signskin\u0022 here."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\l[3]This message box has 3 lines to it rather than 2, "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["so more text can be shown at once. Lorem ipsum "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\wuThis message box is at the top."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\wmThis message box is in the middle."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\wuThis message box is\\wm jumping around the "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["screen\\wd in a rather off-putting way."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\opThis message box slides on-screen at the start."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\clThis message box slides off-screen at the end."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Text speed and audio"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\ts[]This text appeared instantly!"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\ts[5]This text is slow to appear."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Slow text speed is 4, normal speed is 2, fast speed "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["is 1. It takes this many 1/80ths of a second for the "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["next character in a message to appear."]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Audio"]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["\\se[Pkmn move learnt]Sound effect \u0022Pkmn move "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["learnt\u0022 was played."]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["Music effect \u0022Item get\u0022 will be played."]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["\\me[Item get]"]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Start"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Cancel"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["A complete list of all message options is available on "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["the wiki."]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

property.value: {"id":14,"name":"Pok\u00E9mon-checking NPC","x":1,"y":5,"pages":[{"condition":{"switch1_valid":false,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"trainer_SCIENTIST","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":6,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":0,"list":[{"c":118,"i":0,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["Choose a topic."]},{"c":102,"i":0,"p":[["What is your first Pok\u00E9mon?","Is a Celebi in your party?","Give a Celebi","Cancel"],4]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[0,"What is your first Pok\u00E9mon?"]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["Get the first able Pok\u00E9mon in the party, and store its "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["party index in Game Variable 1."]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["Stores -1 if it can\u0027t find an able Pok\u00E9mon in the party."]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["An \u0022able\u0022 Pok\u00E9mon is a non-Egg, non-fainted "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbFirstAblePokemon(1)"]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[1,1,0,0,4]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["You don\u0027t have any able Pok\u00E9mon with you."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":108,"i":2,"p":["Retrieve the Pok\u00E9mon whose party index is in "]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["Game Variable 1."]},{"c":408,"i":2,"p":["Store that Pok\u00E9mon\u0027s name in Game Variable 2."]},{"c":355,"i":2,"p":["pkmn = pbGetPokemon(1)"]},{"c":655,"i":2,"p":["pbSet(2, pkmn.name)"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["\\v[2] is the first Pok\u00E9mon in your party."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[1,"Is a Celebi in your party?"]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["Counts fainted Pok\u00E9mon, but not Eggs."]},{"c":111,"i":1,"p":[12,"$player.has_species?(:CELEBI)"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["You have a Celebi in your party."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["You don\u0027t have a Celebi in your party."]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":119,"i":1,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[2,"Give a Celebi"]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["Gives the player a Level 20 Celebi."]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["If it can\u0027t be added to the party, it is stored in the PC "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["instead."]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["To only let the Pok\u00E9mon be added to the party, use "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["pbAddToParty instead."]},{"c":108,"i":1,"p":["See the Pok\u00E9mon Fan Club events for more "]},{"c":408,"i":1,"p":["examples."]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["pbAddPokemon(:CELEBI, 20)"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":0,"p":[3,"Cancel"]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":404,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}

"]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["An Internet shortcut to the wiki can be found in the "]},{"c":401,"i":1,"p":["project\u0027s main folder."]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":411,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":355,"i":1,"p":["$player.has_pokegear = true"]},{"c":655,"i":1,"p":["$player.has_running_shoes = true"]},{"c":249,"i":1,"p":[{"_class":"RPG::AudioFile","@volume":100,"@name":"Item get","@pitch":100}]},{"c":101,"i":1,"p":["You received a Pok\u00E9gear and Running Shoes."]},{"c":123,"i":1,"p":["A",0]},{"c":0,"i":1,"p":[]},{"c":412,"i":0,"p":[]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]},{"condition":{"switch1_valid":true,"switch1_id":1,"switch2_valid":false,"switch2_id":1,"variable_valid":false,"variable_id":1,"variable_value":0,"self_switch_valid":false,"self_switch_ch":"A"},"graphic":{"character_name":"NPC 28","character_hue":0,"pattern":0,"tile_id":0,"direction":4,"opacity":255,"blend_type":0},"move_type":0,"move_speed":3,"move_frequency":3,"move_route":{"repeat":true,"skippable":false,"list":[{"code":0,"parameters":[]}]},"walk_anime":true,"step_anime":false,"direction_fix":false,"through":false,"always_on_top":false,"trigger":3,"list":[{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["Every map you can end up in after having all your "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["Pok\u00E9mon faint (typically Pok\u00E9 Centers and home) "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["must have an Autorun event in it like this one."]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["This event fully heals all the player\u0027s Pok\u00E9mon, says "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["something to that effect, and turns the \u0022Starting "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["over\u0022 switch OFF again."]},{"c":108,"i":0,"p":["For convenience, this can be a single page in an "]},{"c":408,"i":0,"p":["NPC\u0027s event (e.g. Mom, a nurse)."]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["\\rOh... Are you all right? Well, you\u0027ll have better luck "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["this time."]},{"c":314,"i":0,"p":[0]},{"c":101,"i":0,"p":["[This message was triggered by the \u0022Starting Over\u0022 "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["Game Switch being ON. Now turning that Game "]},{"c":401,"i":0,"p":["Switch off.]"]},{"c":121,"i":0,"p":[1,1,1]},{"c":0,"i":0,"p":[]}]}]}
